## Summary

- [ ] Linked issue (or `N/A`)
- [ ] Summary of changes
- [ ] UI contract change type: `additive` / `semantic change` / `breaking` /
      `N/A`

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix / patch
- [ ] New state, variant, recipe, or additive public API
- [ ] Semantic recipe or CSS contract change
- [ ] Breaking UI contract change
- [ ] Documentation / config only
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run check` passes (alias for `npm run ci:verify`)
- [ ] Contract updates are reflected in tests, snapshots, manifests, or
      validation scripts as needed
- [ ] Generated output in `dist/` was regenerated via `npm run build` if
      package output changed
- [ ] Docs are updated, or `N/A` is noted below
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased]` updated, or `N/A` is noted below
- [ ] No hex values or raw pixel values introduced
- [ ] Change is token-driven

## Screenshots (if applicable)

## Notes for Reviewers
